§6Versatile Circuit Board§f

§aThe ultimate circuit board — expensive but essential for advanced machines!§f

§bThe Versatile Circuit Board§f is the final tier of circuit board, requiring bismuth and hard plastic. It is the most expensive circuit board (nearly 55 insulators per board).

§6Production§f (§bSoldering Station§f — 20s, 200 kHE/s, 4 MHE total):
§b• 24×§f Capacitor
§b• 16×§f Microchip
§b• 4×§f Versatile Integrated Circuit
§b• 2×§f PVC Bar
§b• 12×§f Printed Circuit Board
§b• 12×§f Lead Wire
§b• 1,000 mB§f Solvent
§b→ §eVersatile Circuit Board§f

§6Used In§f:
§b• Fusion Reactor§f
§b• Hydrotreater§f
§b• Inertial Confinement Fusion Reactor§f (large quantities)
§b• Various advanced machines§f

§eTip§f: Mass-producing Versatile Circuit Boards requires significant infrastructure. Set up automated production of capacitors, microchips, and PCBs before attempting to craft these. Each board costs 4 MHE in the soldering station — plan your power budget accordingly!
